intro: An elementary school quiz for the whole family
description:
Can you still remember elementary school questions?

“I must have learned this before.”
“I kind of remember it.”
But even problems we think we know can be surprisingly hard,
or things we’ve simply forgotten over time.

This game is a knowledge check quiz
based on what you learn in elementary school.

Japanese, math, science, and social studies.
From basic problems taught at school to questions that make you think,
nostalgic elementary school questions appear in quiz form.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question  
・Choose an answer by intuition  
・Understand instantly with results and explanations  

Even when you answer correctly, there’s still something to learn.
Even when you get it wrong, you’ll discover something new.

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or checking knowledge with your family.

Why not take on these nostalgic elementary school questions
together with your family?

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
TT supports game streaming by content creators.
Both individuals and companies are free to stream this game,
and no permission from TT is required.
